# Rishi Kulshreshtha

> AI enthusiast and senior Drupal developer with 14+ years building enterprise web solutions. Open-source contributor and LLM integration pioneer.

## About

Rishi Kulshreshtha is a senior Drupal developer at Redfin Solutions, LLC, based in Maine. He specializes in bridging open-source CMS platforms with modern AI/LLM technologies, and has contributed to the Drupal ecosystem for over a decade.

- 14+ years of Drupal development
- LLM and AI integration with enterprise CMS
- Open-source contributor on Drupal.org and GitHub
- Based in Maine, USA

## Skills

Core: Drupal (6–11), PHP, JavaScript, Svelte, Python
AI/ML: LLM integration, prompt engineering, AI-assisted development
DevOps: GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Linux, Docker
Other: REST/GraphQL APIs, accessibility (WCAG), SEO

## Open Source Achievements

Active contributor to the Drupal project. Modules, patches, and issue queue participation on drupal.org/u/rishikulshreshtha.

## Blog

Blog is coming soon at /blog — covering Drupal deep-dives, AI in the real world, and open-source lessons.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rishikulshreshtha/
- GitHub: https://github.com/RishiKulshreshtha/
- Drupal.org: https://www.drupal.org/u/rishikulshreshtha
- X: https://x.com/RishiShreshtha

## Site structure

- / — Home page (portfolio, games, sections unlocked by winning mini-games)
- /?page=blog — Blog listing
- /?page=blog&post={slug} — Individual blog post
- /about.md — About section in markdown
- /skills.md — Skills section in markdown
- /blog.md — Blog overview in markdown
- /posts/{slug}.md — Individual blog post source markdown
- /llms.txt — This file
- /sitemap.xml — XML sitemap
- /robots.txt — Robots exclusion
